Devotion (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $20,511,938Details
International Box Office $949,942
Worldwide Box Office $21,461,880
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,197,484
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,522,323
Total $2,719,807
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Devotion, an aerial war epic based on the bestselling book of the same name, tells the harrowing true story of two elite US Navy fighter pilots during the Korean War. Their heroic sacrifices would ultimately make them the Navy's most celebrated wingmen.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$5,902,803 (28.8% of total gross)
Legs:3.47 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:95.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$90,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,405 opening theaters/3,458 max. theaters, 4.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $23,268,814

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 23rd, 2022 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: November 24th, 2022 (Wide), released as Devotion - Uma História de Heróis (Portugal)
December 1st, 2022 (Limited), released as Devotion (Двойная петля) (Russia (CIS))
December 1st, 2022 (Wide), released as Historia De Honor (Mexico)
December 2nd, 2022 (Limited) (Finland)
December 8th, 2022 (Wide), released as Irmãos de Honra (Brazil)
Video Release: January 8th, 2023 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for strong language, some war action/violence, and smoking.
(Rating bulletin 2720 (cert #53572), 2/23/2022)
Running Time: 138 minutes
Filming location (state or county): Georgia, United States
Plot point: War
Social setting: Navy
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Based on Factual Book/Article
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Black Label Media, Stage 6 Films, STX Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
